---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement for the local tool
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What is hard, slow, risky, or confusing right now?

## Proposed workflow

Describe what the user should be able to do.

## Area

- Dashboard
- App Settings
- Server Settings
- Core Files
- Loot Studio
- Analyzer
- Graph
- Backups
- Profiles
- Portable Launcher
- Docs

## Safety impact

Could this change write files, run commands, restore backups, or alter loot probabilities?

## Notes

Add screenshots, sample data, or sanitized examples if useful.
